_doc: USDA FAS GAIN Vietnam Coffee Annual — manually transcribed from VM2026-* (May 2026 release). Used as a seed fallback by scraper/sources/usda_gain_pdf.py when the live FAS landing-page fetch fails (current state: FAS Cloudflare-blocks GitHub Actions IPs with 403). Update when USDA publishes a new Coffee Annual or Coffee Semi-annual. Values are in metric tons (USDA's native PSD unit × 60 to convert from thousand 60-kg bags).
source: USDA FAS GAIN VM2026-* (Vietnam Coffee Annual, May 2026)
